arts.ttl: Paul Scholes insists it would be 'RIDICULOUS' for Man United to sell Kobbie Mainoo - and delivers verdict on Alejandro Garnacho's future
arts.sum: Mainoo, who broke into the first team last season, has been linked with a potential move away as United aim to comply with the Premier League's Profit and Sustainability Rules (PSR).

arts.ttl: Southampton are on the brink of hiring a new sporting director after losing Jason Wilcox to Man United
arts.sum: Southampton are closing in on appointing their new sporting director following Jason Wilcox's departure for Manchester United. Wilcox left Southampton for Old Trafford in April.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford issues statement ahead of imminent 'tabloid story'
arts.sum: Manchester United striker Marcus Rashford has released the statement across his social media channels after being informed photographs alongside a controversial rapper were to be published

arts.ttl: ‘Very concrete’: Sky Sports drop breaking Man Utd transfer news before Southampton tie
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are reportedly pushing to sign Marcus Rashford as the striker’s future at Manchester United hangs in the balance. Sky Sports have suggested that the winger could be on his way to Germany, with the Bundesliga outfit stepping up their interest in the 27-year-old. arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund push to sign Man Utd forward Rashford
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are now pushing to sign Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford, according to Sky Germany.

arts.ttl: Why Harry Maguire doesn't start for Manchester United vs Southampton
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim has made three changes to his starting line-up for Thursday night's Premier League clash with Southampton.

arts.ttl: Man Utd's Marcus Rashford defends himself against tabloid hit piece
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford took to social media to pre-emptively defend himself against a tabloid hit piece.

arts.ttl: Manchester United star Marcus Rashford issues statement amid impending 'tabloid story'
arts.sum: "I have never seen this photo, I do not know this person, and I am not friends with him."

arts.ttl: LIVE: Man United face bottom-side Southampton
arts.sum: Follow all the updates from Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Europa League club set to appoint Ole Gunnar Solskjær – First job after Manchester United
arts.sum: Ole Gunnar Solskjær hasn’t had a managerial job since being in charge of Manchester United. That’s not down to a lack of offers for the Norwegian, with there being interest from multiple clubs and also national teams in recent months.
